mapper.select: /** UsptRsltHistDao.select */ select rslt_hist_id , rslt_id , rslt_sttus_cd , presentn_dt , attachment_group_id , process_cn , process_mber_type , creator_id , created_dt from uspt_rslt_hist where rslt_hist_id = #{rsltHistId} and rslt_id = #{rsltId}

/** UsptRsltHistDao.selectPresentnDtList */ select urh.rslt_hist_id , urh.presentn_dt , case when urh.process_mber_type = 'INSIDER' then '관리자' else ci.member_nm end as opetr_nm from uspt_rslt_hist urh left outer join cmmt_insider ci on ci.member_id = urh.creator_id where urh.rslt_id = #{rsltId} and urh.rslt_sttus_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@RSLT_PS}' order by urh.created_dt desc
